mobile.heading: Mobile & Android
mobile.body: Led React Native development at Cointelegraph — iOS + Android, 100K+ active users, 50+ production releases. Built and shipped on both platforms end-to-end.
mobile.cert: Android Professional Certification — Java, Kotlin, Android SDK, MVVM.

hero.tagline: Building high-performance React & React Native apps for 100K+ users.

cv.title: Senior Frontend & React Native Engineer
cv.profile: Senior Frontend Engineer with 5+ years building high-performance web and mobile applications. Expert in React, React Native, and TypeScript. Delivered production apps for 100K+ active users — cut load time 6s → 1.8s (−70%) and bundle size 170MB → 110MB. Comfortable both in cross-functional product teams and as the sole frontend owner. Open to relocation.
